svg.title: SDE Framework — 5-Case Supply Routing + Meta Pool Buffer + L3 Cascade Prevention
svg.desc: SDE 5-case supply routing decision tree, Meta Pool Buffer self-balancing mechanism, and L3 Cascade Prevention algorithm with cascade risk scoring
svg.text: SDE FRAMEWORK — 5-CASE SUPPLY ROUTING | META POOL BUFFER | L3 CASCADE PREVENTION
Lower_pool = L1 + L2 [+ L3 if LPI>50%]
▶ CASCADE CHECK: if L3 > L1+L2 → force L3 in
Exit L3 now → saves ₹1,500 next wk
Only if pool has 2+ L4 members
Scenario: 3 active pools, each 12 members. 3 L4 flagged. Only 1 L1 available. Waitlist has 20.
meta_pool_size = MIN(20, 6 + 2) = 8 members pulled from waitlist
→ 1 existing L1 exits as lower winner (pool draw 1)
→ 2 meta pool members exit as lower winners (pool draws 2+3)
→ 3 L4 members exit as upper winners
→ Remaining 6 meta pool members → fill 6 vacancies in active pools
→ Meta pool label removed. Those 6 members are now L1 in active pools.
→ Meta pool DISSOLVED. Zero orphan members. Self-balancing.
→ Any remaining waitlist (20-8=12) still in queue for next Phase 1/2 refill
Priority: L3 first, then L2, L1
Pair as many L3+L4 as possible
IF Risk ≤ 1.0 → L1 (oldest) → L2 (oldest) → L3 only if LPI>50%
IF Risk > 1.0 → L3 (oldest) → L2 (oldest) → L1 (oldest) [anti-cascade mode]
IF Risk > 2.0 → L3 MANDATORY first partner for every L4 (extreme protection)
IF no lower at all → CASE D (Dual-L4 if 2+ L4) or CASE C (Meta Pool from waitlist)
SUGGESTION: Add CASCADE_RISK score to Weekly Report (alongside LPI). Admin sees cascade risk building week-over-week.
SUGGESTION: Weekly Report dashboard widget: "L3→L4 Pressure Forecast" — shows how many current L3 become L4 next week.
SUGGESTION: If Cascade Risk >1.5 for 3+ consecutive weeks → auto-trigger Priority L3 mode permanently until resolved.
BUG TO FIX: sde_engine.py line 806-832 — supply check only counts L1+L2, ignores L3 entirely. Must include L3 when cascade risk > 1.0.
Q2 — WINNER SELECTION WITHIN A DRAW:
Upper (L4): AI-weighted + Oldest L4 first (longest time at L4 = highest priority)
Lower: Cascade Risk determines tier priority (see above). Within tier: oldest first.
Dual-L4: Pool can draw 2 L4 winners from SAME pool if that pool has 2+ L4 AND zero lower-tier in entire system.
Cross-pool: if Pool A has L4 but zero lower, Pool B lower winner can pair with Pool A upper winner.
FULL SDE FLOW SUMMARY (T-2H SELECTION → T-0H EXECUTION → T+5M CLEANUP)
LPI check → flag L4 → assess supply → Cascade Risk score → select case A/B/C/D/E → Meta Pool if C → stage winners (hidden)
Ext-III → Ext-II → SDE staged winners EXECUTE → reveal winners → regular draws for all untouched 12-member pools
Meta pool distributes remaining members → fills pool vacancies → Meta pool dissolved → Phase 1/2/3 refill → flags cleared → lock released
GUARANTEE: At least 1 L4 exits every week. All 12-member pools draw every week. Winners revealed only at T-0H.
REWARD SCHEME CORE ENGINE v2.0 | SDE Framework + Meta Pool Buffer + L3 Cascade Prevention | Session: Soheb Khan User 2 / Sohebkhan.sk11 | 2026-06-14
